intro: This Algorithm Theoretical Basis Document (ATBD) comprehensively outlines the algorithms used to derive the Copernicus Urban Atlas 2021 (UA). The UA provides information on land cover and land use in cities using Very High Resolution (VHR) sensors and Sentinel-2 data. The document details source data, preprocessing steps for radiometric and geometric correction, and processing techniques including change detection methodology. Methods used to verify the accuracy of the dataset are also described, alongside limitations encountered during production, providing a complete reference for the UA 2021 production process.
